description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image and runs an apt-get update, installs sqlite3>=3.20.0, and prints the Python version in a global before_script. Cache pip files in ~/.cache/pip/ and rely on the default stages (test then deploy). Add a test job (default test stage) that executes pip install -U pip setuptools, pip install -e .[test], and tox -e "py36-django{20,21,22},style". Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs pip install -U pip setuptools, pip install -e .[docs], make docs, moves the generated Sphinx HTML to a public/ folder, publishes public/ as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch only.
